Pannekoekhuis De Nachtegaal Rotterdam – Forest Pancake House for Families

Rotterdam

Classic pancake house in a beautiful forest with warm service — generous portions and family‑friendly vibes that make every bite feel like Sunday.

Pannekoekhuis De Nachtegaal is a classic forest-side pancake house near Rotterdam with generous portions and warm family-friendly atmosphere.

Pr. Beatrixlaan 11, 3062 CM Rotterdam
👯‍♀️Easygoing🧸Little Ones
